description_long: This is a robust rectangular table featuring a dark wooden top with a rich, polished finish and visible wood grain. The tabletop is supported by two sturdy, industrial-style metal legs, each forming an inverted 'T' shape, connected by a horizontal metal stretcher for added stability. The legs and stretcher have a matte, dark metallic appearance, suggesting durability and a modern aesthetic. The table's design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. Its proportions and materials make it suitable for heavy-duty use in urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or communal spaces. The overall construction suggests it is built to withstand frequent use and exposure to the elements.
description: A sturdy rectangular table with a dark wooden top and industrial metal legs, featuring a clean, modern design. The table is robust and suitable for urban outdoor or communal settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the dark wooden tabletop and both metal legs with the connecting stretcher visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the tabletop and the depth of the metal legs, with the stretcher partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and both metal legs with the stretcher in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slim tabletop edge and the depth of the supporting legs.
